# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
        enabled: true
    egressGateways:
      - name: istio-egressgateway
        enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
    pilot:
      configMap: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectedAnnotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/interceptionMode: "REDIRECT"
        sidecar.istio.io/proxyAdminPort: "15000"
        sidecar.istio.io/statusPort: "15020"
    meshConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      defaultConfig:
        proxyAdminPort: 15000
        serviceCluster: istio-proxy
        drainDuration: 45s
        parentShutdownDuration: 60s
        connectTimeout: 10s
        statsConfig:
          statsInclusionPrefix:
            - "istio."
            - "cluster_manager"
            - "listener_manager"
            - "server"
            - "cluster.xds_cluster"
            - "cluster.xds_cluster_"
            - "cluster.xds_cluster_"
            - "cluster.xds_cluster_"
            - "cluster.xds_cluster_"
            - "cluster.xds_cluster_"
